headline_finding.name: frozen_land_skin_temperature
headline_finding.mechanism: OperationalNamelist.from_grid built without use_noahmp/sf_surface_physics/noahmp_static; use_noahmp defaults False -> land tile stays on prescribed bulk surface path; state.t_skin never prognostically advanced over land. CPU truth runs Noah-MP (sf_surface_physics=4). The validated NoahMP coupler (noahmp_surface_hook.noahmp_surface_step) exists and is wired in daily_pipeline but was never threaded into the standalone nested pipeline used by canary/TOST/v0.12-final-gate runs since the v0.13 KI-5 rerouting.
headline_finding.classification: missing physics wiring / configuration gap in operational nested pipeline; NOT a kernel or dycore bug; NOT a regression from the moist-cqw/PSFC/LBC fixes

MUB_PB_static.location: 100% in 5-cell nest frame; interior at fp32 wrfout quantum

QVAPOR.trend: growth decelerating, bias shrinking after h24 (diurnal component); watch h48/h72

T2.class: night stable-PBL; direct frozen-TSK signature; recovers daytime

formal_fail_composition_h24.note: No dynamics field (PSFC/P/MU/PH/U/V/W/T/RAINNC) fails its manifest at any lead 1-24. PSFC worst lead h18 RMSE 105.3 < 120 limit.

dynamics_health.lbc_cadence_regression: none; old failure was slope 51-73 Pa/h monotonic, current slope +2.0 is diurnal aliasing of the comparator linear fit
dynamics_health.spot_checks_h26_h29: PSFC 40-43 Pa, P 22-30 Pa, no renewed drift past h24

diurnal_mass_excursion.origin: parent d01, domain-wide incl. ocean; contributors: frozen land TSK both domains + bounded RRTMG clear-sky heating lane + ocean surface moisture lane (Q2 +1.6e-3 sustained, LH -26 W/m2)
diurnal_mass_excursion.action: re-adjudicate after land-surface fix; do not open a dycore sprint on this signal

qnrain.class: sparse number-concentration cells, chaotic microphysics placement; report-only

manager_actions: Let the Canary 72h run finish (stability + dynamics-lane evidence remain valid; manifests pass for dynamics fields).
Do NOT promote this run as the release field-parity green gate (land surface physics absent).
Do NOT launch Switzerland GPU before the land-surface fix: the Gotthard d01 domain is land-dominated alpine; frozen TSK there would invalidate the whole run.
Open the nested-pipeline land-surface activation sprint immediately after the GPU frees.
Honest-record note: v0.12.0 final 24h nested gate and v0.13 TOST cases ran this same pipeline and therefore also had frozen land TSK; add to KNOWN_ISSUES when convenient.
